name: autotel-monorepo
description: Write Once, Observe Anywhere - Zero-boilerplate OpenTelemetry for JavaScript/TypeScript

scripts.quality: turbo run build && turbo run lint && turbo run format && turbo run type-check && turbo run test && turbo run test:integration
scripts.intent:validate: intent validate packages/autotel/skills && intent validate packages/autotel-hono/skills && intent validate packages/autotel-tanstack/skills && intent validate packages/autotel-cloudflare/skills && intent validate packages/autotel-subscribers/skills && intent validate packages/autotel-edge/skills && intent validate packages/autotel-mcp-instrumentation/skills && intent validate packages/autotel-mcp/skills && intent validate packages/autotel-devtools/skills

author: Jag Reehal <jag@jagreehal.com> (https://jagreehal.com)
